name: RICARDO PEREZ DIONISIO

Customer Service Professional, seeking to
transition into a Receptionist role with 5+ years

to effectively manage front desk operations,
handle client inquiries, and contribute to a
positive office environment.

Greet and direct 20 patients upon arrival by providing clear
instructions for health assessments and testing ensuring smooth
Utilizing design software like Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and
InDesign to produce digital artwork by gathering information about
the target audience, brand identity, and market trends to inform
design decisions, designing icons, illustrations, and other digital
Excel in a team of 80 employees to process and ship orders from 12
Utilize skills in problem-solving and critical thinking, routinely work
with incomplete data and resolve issues.
